commands.author: samson910022

target.title: fix(status): warm model context-window cache before /status reads it
target.body:
## Problem

\/status\ shows \200K\ (DEFAULT_CONTEXT_TOKENS) for any model discovered from the provider catalog, regardless of the model's actual context window.

## Root Cause

**Four** independent gaps kept MODEL_CONTEXT_TOKEN_CACHE empty when \/status\ read it:

1. **No startup warming**: \server-startup-early.ts\ had no cache warming call
2. **prepareContextWindowCache short-circuit**: \skipRuntimeConfigLoad=true\ blocked even async warming
3. **Status explicitly disabled warming**: \status-text.ts\ passed \^GllowAsyncLoad: false\
4. **CLI status also disabled warming**: \status.summary.ts\ passed \^GllowAsyncLoad: false\ in BOTH config-model and session-row calls
5. **Import bypass**: \status.summary.runtime.ts\ imported raw cache from \context-resolution.js\ instead of warming wrapper from \context.ts\

## Fix (6 files)

| File | Change | Gap Closed |
|------|--------|-----------|
| \src/gateway/server-startup-early.ts\ | Add \oid ensureContextWindowCacheLoaded()\ at startup | #1 |
| \src/agents/context.ts\ | Fire async warming when \skipRuntimeConfigLoad=true\ and \^GllowAsyncLoad !== false\ | #2 |
| \src/status/status-text.ts\ | Remove \^GllowAsyncLoad: false\ | #3 |
| \src/commands/status.summary.ts\ | Remove \^GllowAsyncLoad: false\ (both config-model and session-row call sites) | #4 |
| \src/commands/status.summary.runtime.ts\ | Import from \context.js\ (warming wrapper) | #5 |
| \src/agents/context.lookup.test.ts\ | 4 regression tests | Coverage |

## Design Notes

- **Fire-and-forget**: Uses \oid\ matching existing \primeRemoteSkillsCache()\
- **Backward-compatible**: \^GllowAsyncLoad !== false\ correctly distinguishes \undefined\ (fire warming) from \ alse\ (skip)
- **No slash-model behavior change**: Does not touch \status-message.ts\ (unlike superseded PR #92772)
- **Startup warming + on-demand warming**: Covers both Gateway \/status\ and CLI \openclaw status\ paths

## Related

- Closes #92760
- Supersedes #92772 (narrower scope)
